name_en: Ministry of Roads and Urban Development
description: Iran's Ministry of Roads and Urban Development was formed in 2011 by merging the Ministry of Roads and Transportation with the Ministry of Housing and Urban Development. Under [Mehrdad Bazrpash](/people/mehrdad-bazrpash) (2022-2024), the ministry managed transportation infrastructure during the Ebrahim Raisi administration.
editorial_notes: Formed 2011 by merger of Ministry of Roads and Transportation + Ministry of Housing.
